final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing social media avatar for a content creator account focused on new energy vehicles, consumer electronics, and lifestyle products — suitable for both Chinese and international platforms.

Style/medium: flat illustration avatar, clean icon-style design
Composition: centered, square-safe composition with balanced visual weight, icon readable at small sizes
Subject: a stylized abstract emblem combining motifs of an electric vehicle silhouette, a circuit/tech element, and a lifestyle spark or leaf — unified into a single cohesive mark
Scene/backdrop: solid or minimal gradient background, no scene
Lighting/mood: friendly, approachable, modern
Color palette: clean blue-green and white with a warm accent (e.g., soft amber or mint), universally neutral — no red-green-only combinations, no culturally charged color schemes
Materials/textures: flat vector with subtle depth, no photorealistic texture
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must read clearly at 100×100 px thumbnail size; no human face, no religious symbols, no national flags, no hand gestures; culturally neutral for CN / US / EU / SEA / Middle East audiences
Avoid: overly complex detail that collapses at small size, culturally specific iconography, any symbol that could be misread as political or offensive across regions, stock-photo realism
